strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, GitLab CI, and automated testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, key required stack components
Limited evidence of direct experience with Kotlin, Java, or Python in enterprise automation contexts
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially hindering collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong alignment with core requirements: 8+ years of full-stack experience using TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS; direct contribution to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq; and deep DevOps/automation skills with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD. However, the resume lacks any mention of Nest.js or Vitest — two explicitly required technologies — and while Java/Kotlin are listed in skills, no project evidence ties them to enterprise automation. This gap in required stack proficiency significantly impacts fit despite strong overall experience.
